expectations.text: The decision tells `self-improve` to mine both `## Codebase Patterns` and every `Learnings for future iterations` block.
expectations.evidence:
Pass `self-improve` a distilled handoff, not raw tracking data: reusable rules only, plus nearby `AGENTS.md` and linked docs when they contain the destination guidance. Keep the handoff concise and implementation-oriented.

Mine `progress.txt` from `## Codebase Patterns` at the top and every per-entry `**Learnings for future iterations:**` block, especially `Patterns discovered`, `Gotchas encountered`, and `Useful context`.

Preserve durable learnings about validation/safety, cache/state/replay behavior, UX/accessibility, testing/anti-flake, and environment/setup guidance. Keep representative concrete rules when useful; drop story IDs, timestamps, temporary blockers, and one-off filenames.

expectations.text: The decision preserves durable validation, replay/cache, accessibility, and test-stability learnings from progress.
